caption: A screen recording captures a web browser open to a conceptual mapping tool against a black background. The interface features several grey circles connected by curved lines, with a few icons including a red and white figure and a red figure icon. To the right, a video call window shows a man wearing a dark shirt and glasses, and a separate smaller video feed depicts a person in a red shirt playing a guitar. The browser tabs display titles such as "Trust & Learning by Systemic", "Future of Society by Systemic", and "Insights | Introduction to Rumi". Other legible on-screen text includes "Search" and "Save Biddinger". Across the sequence, the man in the video call remains largely stationary, though his expression shifts slightly. The overall composition of the mapping tool and the browser interface remains constant as the video progresses.
